channel.title: Tamazia Insights
channel.description: Lawyer-led SEO and compliance content perspectives from Tamazia.

item.title: Mental Health and Telehealth SEO 2026
item.description: Mental health and telehealth SEO for 2026 under BACP, NICE and CQC duty-of-care, with the jurisdictional disclosure schema telehealth needs and the author authority AI engines reward.
item.dc:creator: Aman Pareek
item.author: founder@tamazia.co.uk (Aman Pareek)

item.title: Weight Loss and GLP-1 Clinic SEO 2026
item.description: Weight loss and GLP-1 clinic SEO for 2026 under the MHRA and ASA ban on advertising Wegovy, Ozempic and Mounjaro to the public. Compliant ranking for online pharmacies and clinics.
item.dc:creator: Aman Pareek
item.author: founder@tamazia.co.uk (Aman Pareek)

item.title: Medical Clinic Wikipedia and AI Authority 2026
item.description: How clinics build Wikipedia, Wikidata and schema entity authority within the conflict-of-interest rules to get cited by ChatGPT, Perplexity, Claude and Gemini in 2026.
item.dc:creator: Aman Pareek
item.author: founder@tamazia.co.uk (Aman Pareek)

item.title: Dubai Clinic SEO 2026: DHA and Medical Tourism
item.description: Dubai clinic SEO and medical tourism for 2026 under DHA and MOHAP advertising rules. Source-market intent from the UK, GCC and India, destination authority and hreflang.
item.dc:creator: Aman Pareek
item.author: founder@tamazia.co.uk (Aman Pareek)

item.title: Fertility and IVF Clinic SEO 2026: UK Rankings
item.description: Fertility and IVF clinic SEO for 2026 under HFEA success-rate and add-ons advertising rules. CARE, CREATE, Bourn Hall, ARGC and the UK fertility market ranked by AI authority.
item.dc:creator: Aman Pareek
item.author: founder@tamazia.co.uk (Aman Pareek)

item.title: Private GP and Consultant SEO London 2026
item.description: The London private GP and consultant search market mapped for 2026, with CQC, GMC Good Medical Practice and the GMC-registered author box that wins AI citations.
item.dc:creator: Aman Pareek
item.author: founder@tamazia.co.uk (Aman Pareek)

item.title: Dental Practice SEO UK 2026: Group Rankings
item.description: Dental practice and group SEO for the UK in 2026 under GDC ethical advertising, CQC and tooth-whitening law. The dental corporates and cosmetic practices ranked by digital authority.
item.dc:creator: Aman Pareek
item.author: founder@tamazia.co.uk (Aman Pareek)

item.title: Healthcare SEO Agency London 2026: Buying Guide
item.description: How to select and brief a compliance-first healthcare SEO agency in 2026. Six evaluation criteria, the red-flag checklist, and the CQC, GMC and ASA standards an agency must understand.
item.dc:creator: Aman Pareek
item.author: founder@tamazia.co.uk (Aman Pareek)

item.title: Cosmetic and Aesthetic Clinic SEO London 2026
item.description: Cosmetic and aesthetic clinic SEO for 2026 under ASA CAP Section 12 and the MHRA ban on advertising prescription-only injectables. Compliant ranking for surgery, dermatology and injectables.
item.dc:creator: Aman Pareek
item.author: founder@tamazia.co.uk (Aman Pareek)

item.title: Top 50 Private Clinics in London 2026: CQC Map
item.description: The 50 leading private clinics and hospitals in London ranked for 2026 by CQC registration, GMC consultants, fees and AI citation. HCA, Cleveland Clinic London, Harley Street and more.
item.dc:creator: Aman Pareek
item.author: founder@tamazia.co.uk (Aman Pareek)

item.title: Pre-IPO Law Firm Marketing and SEO Strategy 2026
item.description: The 18-month content protocol for law firms advising on pre-IPO listings: Reg FD compliance and AI-search visibility.

item.title: SRA Transparency Rules Law Firm SEO 2026 Guide

item.title: SEC Regulation FD and the Pre-IPO Digital Footprint: A Checklist for 2026 Listings
item.description: Pre-IPO content protocol for listings on NYSE, Nasdaq, LSE Main Market, and DFM. The 18-month digital-footprint timeline that produces zero-incident outcomes.
item.dc:creator: Aman Pareek
item.source: SEC Reg FD · FCA Listing Rules
item.category: SEC Reg FD · FCA Listing Rules
item.author: founder@tamazia.co.uk (Aman Pareek)

item.title: How One Asia Pacific Hotel Group Replaced 83% of OTA Dependency in Six Months
item.description: Anonymised case-study walk-through of the campaign behind 840% organic-user growth and a 113% revenue YoY shift. Direct-booking unit economics at scale.
item.dc:creator: Aman Pareek
item.author: founder@tamazia.co.uk (Aman Pareek)

item.title: Why Your Law Firm's SRA Transparency Page Is Probably Non-Compliant in 2026
item.description: SRA Code Rules 8.7 and 8.9 require specific fee, complaints and regulatory information on every solicitor's website. Most still miss the same five items. Here is the audit checklist.
item.dc:creator: Aman Pareek
item.author: founder@tamazia.co.uk (Aman Pareek)
